properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and validate JWT tokens. Must be a strong, secure, and private value.

properties.name: jwt.expirationSeconds
properties.description: Token expiration time in seconds. Defines how long a JWT remains valid after being issued.

properties.name: viacep.baseUrl
properties.description: Base URL for the ViaCEP API used to fetch address information by postal code (CEP). Example: https://viacep.com.br/ws
